description: Business rules for stakeholder classification and tagging

dual_tags.description: Allow contacts to have multiple stakeholder types

examples.reasoning: Community leader AND product user (job seeking)

hiring_candidates.reasoning: Internal hiring candidates should not be tracked in stakeholder system
detection: Email threads about job interviews, compensation, start dates
hiring_candidates.action: Exclude from stakeholder system (do not create profiles, do not include in weekly reviews)
hiring_candidates.exception: Specific individuals who V sees as networking relationships beyond hiring context can be classified as networking contacts

personal_emails.description: When contact uses personal email (gmail.com, mac.com, etc.), track as auxiliary but prioritize professional email as primary key
personal_emails.action: Store personal email in 'auxiliary_emails' field, fetch professional email from LinkedIn/web search

primary_email_priority.3: Most recent email used in communication

indicators: No transactional relationship (not paying, not being paid)
Enterprise HR expertise, alumni network partnerships
V sees connection potential independent of business role
May have business context (hiring, sales) but relationship is broader
examples: Tim He - hiring candidate but also networking relationship
networking_contact.note: Distinct from 'prospect' (which implies business opportunity); networking is relational, not transactional

internal_facilitators.description: Employees of partner organization who facilitate intro
internal_facilitators.classification: Tag with partner organization's stakeholder type

indicators: Offers access to groups (Elpha, Tech Ladies, etc.)
